LanguageData.VCE_CanAlienFish.description: Safely store alien fish in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely.
LanguageData.VCE_CanAlienFish.label: can alien fish x20
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryAlienFish.description: Deep fry alien fish. Deep fried food is very tasty, but not very good for your health.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryAlienFish.label: deep fry alien fish x20
LanguageData.VCE_CanFish.description: Safely store fish in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely.
LanguageData.VCE_CanFish.label: can fish x20
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryFish.description: Deep fry fish. Deep fried food is very tasty, but not very good for your health.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryFish.label: deep fry fish x20
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeFine.description: Cook two complex bakes assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients and flour.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeFine.label: cook fine bake x2
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeFineBulk.description: Cook 8 complex bakes assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients and flour.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeFineBulk.label: cook fine bake x8
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeGourmet.description: Cook two culinary works of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity bake.\n\nThis recipe does not allow mixed ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeGourmet.label: cook gourmet bake x2
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeLavish.description: Cook two masterpieces of the culinary arts, these bakes nourish the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeLavish.label: cook lavish bake x2
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeLavishBulk.description: Cook 8 masterpieces of the culinary arts, these bakes nourish the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeLavishBulk.label: cook lavish bake x8
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeSimple.description: Cook two simple bakes quickly cooked from flour.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeSimple.label: cook simple bake x2
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeSimpleBulk.description: Cook 8 simple bakes quickly cooked from flour.
LanguageData.VCE_CookBakeSimpleBulk.label: cook simple bake x8
LanguageData.VCE_CanEggs.description: Safely store boiled eggs in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely.
LanguageData.VCE_CanEggs.label: can eggs x20
LanguageData.VCE_CanFruit.description: Safely store fruit in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely.\n\nPreserved fruit can be used in the production of desserts.
LanguageData.VCE_CanFruit.label: can fruit x20
LanguageData.VCE_CanMeats.description: Safely store meat chunks in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely.
LanguageData.VCE_CanMeats.label: can meats x20
LanguageData.VCE_CanProduce.description: Safely store vegetables in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely.
LanguageData.VCE_CanProduce.label: can produce x20
LanguageData.VCE_AgaveNectar.description: Create agave nectar from agave. Agave nectar is a thin and semi-sweet nectar, known for its healing and anti-inflammatory properties.
LanguageData.VCE_AgaveNectar.label: make agave nectar
LanguageData.VCE_ChocolateSyrup.description: Create chocolate syrup from genetically modified chocolate. While still not good for you, chocolate syrup is not quite as bad as straight sugar.
LanguageData.VCE_ChocolateSyrup.label: make chocolate syrup
LanguageData.VCE_ChopCondiments.description: Mix a batch of different condiments into a barely edible organic mass that can be fed to animals. Still better than supermarket pet food.
LanguageData.VCE_ChopCondiments.label: mix condiments into kibble
LanguageData.VCE_InsectJellyPreserves.description: Create insect jelly preserves from insect jelly. Very rich and sweet, while being surprisingly healthy.
LanguageData.VCE_InsectJellyPreserves.label: make insect jelly preserves
LanguageData.VCE_MakeSalt.description: Grind and process natural stone to extract edible salts from within stone chunks.\n\nUses the Cooking skill.
LanguageData.VCE_MakeSalt.label: make salt
LanguageData.VCE_MakeSaltfromBlocks.description: Grind and process natural stone to extract edible salts from within stone blocks.\n\nUses the Cooking skill.
LanguageData.VCE_MakeSaltfromBlocks.label: make salt (blocks)
LanguageData.VCE_Mayo.description: Create mayo from eggs. A thick emulsion of egg, oil, and other herbs. Mayonnaise, while terrible for you, adds a pleasing tang and is very calorically dense.
LanguageData.VCE_Mayo.label: make mayo
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.description: Create smokeleaf butter from smokeleaf and milk. A thickened, fatty substance made by churning milk into very thick cream, combining with smokeleaf oil and allowing it to set. Very unhealthy and hits quite a bit harder than a joint.
LanguageData.VCE_SmokeleafButter.label: make smokeleaf butter
LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.description: Create hot sauce from peppers. A potent, spicy sauce made from blending and simmering chilis and other spices. While particularly strong hot sauces hurt at first, they are known to numb pain and work up a warm sweat shortly after consumption.
LanguageData.VCE_HotSauce.label: make hot sauce
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.description: Create ketchup from tomatoes. A thick sauce made from stewing tomatoes, both salty and tangy in tandem with a sweet aftertaste. Perfect for meaty meals or fried foods.
LanguageData.VCE_Ketchup.label: make ketchup
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertFine.description: Cook a complex dessert assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.\n\nNote that because Chocolate has 0.10 nutrition per unit, some of it will be wasted while cooking this recipe. Consider using the bulk (x4) version of this recipe instead to avoid wastage.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertFine.label: cook fine dessert
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertFineBulk.description: Cook 4 complex desserts assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertFineBulk.label: cook fine dessert x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertGourmet.description: Cook a culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity dessert.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertGourmet.label: cook gourmet dessert
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertLavish.description: Cook a masterpiece of the culinary arts, this dessert nourishes the body, mind, and soul.\n\nNote that because Chocolate has 0.10 nutrition per unit, some of it will be wasted while cooking this recipe. Consider using the bulk (x4) version of this recipe instead to avoid wastage.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertLavish.label: cook lavish dessert
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertLavishBulk.description: Cook 4 masterpieces of the culinary arts, this dessert nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertLavishBulk.label: cook lavish dessert x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertSimple.description: Cook a simple dessert quickly made from a few fruits and other ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertSimple.label: cook simple dessert
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertSimpleBulk.description: Cook 4 simple desserts quickly made from a few fruits and other ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookDessertSimpleBulk.label: cook simple dessert x4
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryMeats.description: Deep fry large meat chunks. Deep fried food is very tasty, but not very good for your health.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryMeats.label: deep fry meats x20
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryVegetables.description: Deep fry vegetables. Deep fried food is very tasty, but not very good for your health.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFryVegetables.label: deep fry vegetables x20
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillFine.description: Cook a complex grill assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillFine.label: cook fine grill
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillFineBulk.description: Cook 4 complex grills assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillFineBulk.label: cook fine grill x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillGourmet.description: Cook a culinary works of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity grill.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillGourmet.label: cook gourmet grill
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillLavish.description: Cook a masterpiece of the culinary arts, this grill nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillLavish.label: cook lavish grill
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillLavishhBulk.description: Cook 4 masterpieces of the culinary arts, these grills nourish the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillLavishhBulk.label: cook lavish grill x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillSimple.description: Cook two simple grills quickly cooked from a few meat ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillSimple.label: cook simple grill
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillSimpleBulk.description: Cook 4 simple grills quickly cooked from a few meat ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGrillSimpleBulk.label: cook simple grill x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookMealGourmet.description: Cook a culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity meal.
LanguageData.VCE_CookMealGourmet.label: cook gourmet meal
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupFine.description: Prepare a fine uncooked soup assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupFine.label: prepare fine soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupGourmet.description: Prepare a gourmet uncooked soup. A culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity soup.\n\nThis recipe does not allow mixed ingredients, and takes a long time to make.
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupGourmet.label: prepare gourmet soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupLavish.description: Prepare a lavish uncooked soup. A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this soup nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupLavish.label: prepare lavish soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupSimple.description: Prepare a simple uncooked soup quickly made from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookSoupSimple.label: prepare simple soup
LanguageData.VCE_CookStewFine.description: Prepare a fine uncooked stew assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookStewFine.label: prepare fine stew
LanguageData.VCE_CookStewLavish.description: Prepare a lavish uncooked stew. A masterpiece of the culinary arts, this stew nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookStewLavish.label: prepare lavish stew
LanguageData.VCE_CookStewSimple.description: Prepare a simple uncooked stew quickly made from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookStewSimple.label: prepare simple stew
LanguageData.VCE_WasabiPaste.description: Create wasabi paste from raw wasabi. It is used as a pungent condiment for sushi and other foods. It is similar in taste to hot mustard rather than chili peppers in that it stimulates the nose more than the tongue. It loses its flavour and deteriorates extremely fast.
LanguageData.VCE_WasabiPaste.label: make wasabi paste
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFrySushi.description: Deep fry sushi. Deep fried food is very tasty, but not very good for your health.
LanguageData.VCE_DeepFrySushi.label: deep fry sushi x20
LanguageData.VCE_CookChirashizushiSimple.description: Make a Chirashizushi bowl quickly prepared from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookChirashizushiSimple.label: make chirashizushi bowl (simple)
LanguageData.VCE_CookChirashizushiSimpleBulk.descript: Make 4 Chirashizushi bowls quickly prepared from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookChirashizushiSimpleBulk.label: make chirashizushi bowls (simple) x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookFutomakiLavish.description: Make a masterpiece of the culinary arts, this futomaki nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookFutomakiLavish.label: make futomaki (lavish)
LanguageData.VCE_CookFutomakiLavishBulk.description: Make 4 masterpieces of the culinary arts, these futomaki nourish the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookFutomakiLavishBulk.label: make futomaki (lavish) x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookGunkanmakiGourmet.description: Make a culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity gunkanmaki.
LanguageData.VCE_CookGunkanmakiGourmet.label: make gunkanmaki (gourmet)
LanguageData.VCE_CookNigiriFine.description: Make nigiri assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookNigiriFine.label: make nigiri (fine)
LanguageData.VCE_CookNigiriFineBulk.description: Make 4 nigiri assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookNigiriFineBulk.label: make nigiri (fine) x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookNorimakiSimple.description: Make norimaki quickly prepared from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookNorimakiSimple.label: make norimaki (simple)
LanguageData.VCE_CookNorimakiSimpleBulk.description: Make 4 norimaki quickly prepared from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookNorimakiSimpleBulk.label: make norimaki (simple) x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookOshizushiiGourmet.description: Make a culinary work of art, characterized by refined, even elaborate preparation and presentation of an aesthetically balanced, albeit low quantity oshizushi.
LanguageData.VCE_CookOshizushiiGourmet.label: make oshizushi (gourmet)
LanguageData.VCE_CookTemakiLavish.description: Make a masterpiece of the culinary arts, this temaki nourishes the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookTemakiLavish.label: make temaki (lavish)
LanguageData.VCE_CookTemakiLavishBulk.description: Make 4 masterpieces of the culinary arts, these temaki nourish the body, mind, and soul.
LanguageData.VCE_CookTemakiLavishBulk.label: make temaki (lavish) x4
LanguageData.VCE_CookUramakiFine.description: Make uramaki assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookUramakiFine.label: make uramaki (fine)
LanguageData.VCE_CookUramakiFineBulk.description: Make 4 uramaki assembled with care from a wide selection of ingredients.
LanguageData.VCE_CookUramakiFineBulk.label: make uramaki (fine) x4
LanguageData.VCE_MakeHumanSurimi.description: Turn human meat into a nondistinct paste mimicking the texture of lobster, crab, or other shellfish. The taste, though...
LanguageData.VCE_MakeHumanSurimi.label: make human "surimi"
LanguageData.VBE_MakeUnfermentedCider.description: Make unfermented cider with a starter in an air-tight bottle. If left alone to develop the proper bacteria the end result will be a weak alcoholic beverage.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeUnfermentedCider.label: make unfermented cider
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailFine.description: Make a fine cocktail, mixed precisely from multiple ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailFine.label: make fine cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailLavish.description: Make a lavish cocktail, mixed from a wide variety of ingredients and chilled to perfection before meticulously shaken and served.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailLavish.label: make lavish cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailSimple.description: Make a simple cocktail quickly mixed from a duo of ingredients.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailSimple.label: make simple cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailGourmet.description: Make a gourmet cocktail, where every factor from temperature of glass, choice of stirring instrument and type of garnish has been precisely calculated for the maximum flavor and body possible.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCocktailGourmet.label: make gourmet cocktail
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCoffee.description: Make a warm, bitter beverage usually complemented with milk and sugar. A favorite among students and office workers across the galaxy due to high caffeine content and pleasing aroma.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCoffee.label: make coffee
LanguageData.VBE_MakeGoJuiceStock.description: Make a gelatinized cube of Go-Juice, able to be digested rather than injected. While it can be used in any meal, it is often melted into soups or used as a thickening agent in cocktails.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeGoJuiceStock.label: make go-juice stock
LanguageData.VBE_MakeLuciferiumPowder.description: Make a very finely blended powder made from luciferium. Usually put around rims of alcoholic drinks in bars frequented by the wealthy and powerful.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeLuciferiumPowder.label: make luciferium powder
LanguageData.VBE_MakeWakeUpPowder.description: Make a crushed and powdered form of wake-up, surprisingly sweet and sometimes used as a replacement for sugar in desserts or dissolved into a morning espresso.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeWakeUpPowder.label: make wake-up powder
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEnergyDrink.description: Make a sour and fizzy drink finished off with a hint of bitterness. The combination of sugar and caffeine means a burst of energy upfront, but with a crash later. Notable aftertaste of radiation.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEnergyDrink.label: make energy drink
LanguageData.VBE_MixJuice.description: Mix a simple fruit juice made from a few fruits.
LanguageData.VBE_MixJuice.label: mix fruit juice
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrosiaMush.description: Make sliced and pressed ambrosia, can be left alone to ripen into must to be further distilled into an extremely fine liquor.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrosiaMush.label: make ambrosia mush
LanguageData.VBE_MakeGinMush.description: Make a clear but cloudy mixture of juiced berries and miscellaneous grain, ready to be fermented.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeGinMush.label: make gin mush
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrup.description: Make soda syrup by mixing natural fruit juice with high fructose corn syrup.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrup.label: make soda syrup
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTequilaMust.description: Make a thin mixture of juiced agave sap and insect meat starter, ready to be cut and fermented in a barrel.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTequilaMust.label: make tequila must from agave
LanguageData.VBE_MakeVodkaMash.description: Make a thick, starchy mash of raw potatoes and a starter, ready to be fermented.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeVodkaMash.label: make vodka mash
LanguageData.VBE_MakeWhiskeyMash.description: Make a starchy and mostly liquid mixture with pulpy chunks strewn throughout. Ready To be aged.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeWhiskeyMash.label: make whiskey mash
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigarettes.description: Make a small, rolled paper tube stuffed loosely with tobacco leaves.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigarettes.label: make cigarettes
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigars.description: Make a fat, dried tobacco leaf stuffed to the brim with more tobacco leaves and a gold foil wrap around it.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCigars.label: make cigars
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrupBulk.description: Make soda syrup by mixing natural fruit juice with sugar. This recipe is much more efficient.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeSodaSyrupBulk.label: make soda syrup (efficient)
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTea.description: Make a pleasing, aromatic beverage prepared by steeping a bag of tea leaves in boiling water.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTea.label: make tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTequilaMustFromPears.description: Make a thin mixture of prickly cactus pear and insect meat starter, ready to be cut and fermented in a barrel.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTequilaMustFromPears.label: make tequila must from prickly pear
LanguageData.VBE_MakeWhiskeyMashFromFlour.description: Make a starchy and mostly liquid mixture with pulpy chunks strewn throughout. Ready To be aged.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeWhiskeyMashFromFlour.label: make whiskey mash from flour
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeAnimals.label: write animals book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeArt.label: write art book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeConstruction.label: write construction book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeCooking.label: write cooking book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeCrafting.label: write crafting book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeGrowing.label: write growing book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeIntellectual.label: write intellectual book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeMedical.label: write medical book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeMelee.label: write melee book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeMining.label: write mining book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeShooting.label: write shooting book
LanguageData.VBE_RecipeSocial.label: write social book
LanguageData.VBE_BrewCannibalCoffee.description: Brew a drink... for a very particular... refined coffee drinker.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewCannibalCoffee.label: brew cannibal coffee
LanguageData.VBE_BrewIrishCoffee.description: Brew a drink made with whiskey and coffee blended thoroughly before forming a head and being topped with a spoonful of whipped cream. Perfect for those who just got out of bed and are already wanting to go back to it.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewIrishCoffee.label: brew irish coffee
LanguageData.VBE_BrewLatteCoffee.description: Brew a potent espresso mixed with fresh milk to help ease bitterness before pouring and serving. Lattes have a reputation of being particularly meant for “sophisticated” individuals.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewLatteCoffee.label: brew latte coffee
LanguageData.VBE_BrewMochaCoffee.description: Brew a coffee mixed with sweet and luxurious chocolate. Those of snobbish persuasion would argue mocha is more of a dessert than an actual coffee drink.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewMochaCoffee.label: brew mocha coffee
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCoffeeFast.description: Make a warm, bitter beverage usually complemented with milk and sugar. A favorite among students and office workers across the galaxy due to high caffeine content and pleasing aroma. Brewing coffee in a espresso machine is generally much faster.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeCoffeeFast.label: make espresso coffee
LanguageData.VBE_ReheatCoffee.description: This espresso machine has a small built-in grill to reheat iced coffee.
LanguageData.VBE_ReheatCoffee.label: reheat iced coffee
LanguageData.VBE_BrewDalgonaCoffee.description: Brew a trendy, newer drink in the world of coffee rumored to originate from far off steamworlds. Coffee granules are rapidly mixed with sugar to form a thick, luxuriously sweet foam. Afterwards the foam is dispersed over deeply chilled milk before drinking.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewDalgonaCoffee.label: brew dalgona coffee
LanguageData.VBE_BrewMintCoffee.description: Brew a bitter espresso mixed with cream or milk, then further mixed with mint oil and garnished. Cool and velvety coffee gives way to an even cooler, soothing aftertaste, not to mention great smelling breath.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewMintCoffee.label: brew mint coffee
LanguageData.VBE_BrewLemonCoffee.description: Brew an already acidic coffee garnished with a wedge of more acidic lemon, meant to be juiced into the coffee before quickly consumed while hot. An acquired taste to be sure but lauded by those who do prefer it.
LanguageData.VBE_BrewLemonCoffee.label: brew espresso romano
LanguageData.VBE_MixLemonade.description: Squeeze a few lemons, mix the juice with water and add some sugar.
LanguageData.VBE_MixLemonade.label: mix lemonade
LanguageData.VBE_MakeBlackTea.description: Make a particularly bitter tea cut with creamy milk, wakes one up a bit and relaxes one's mind.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeBlackTea.label: make black tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeKombucha.description: Make a sugary tea left out to ferment, after fermenting the end product is a sweet and sour, sometimes even naturally fizzy drink known as kombucha. Praised for health benefits, though some remain skeptical.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeKombucha.label: make kombucha tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTeaFast.description: Make a pleasing, aromatic beverage prepared by steeping a bag of tea leaves in boiling water. Brewing tea in this specially prepared espresso machine is generally much faster.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeTeaFast.label: make fast tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeYuenYeung.description: Make a mixture of coffee and tea. Tea and coffee drinkers respectively set their differences aside while concocting this unholy amalgamation. Whether it’s served hot or cold it’s equally confusing to the imbiber.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeYuenYeung.label: make yuenyeung
LanguageData.VBE_MakeGreenTea.description: Make a light, citrusy green tea spiked with sugar to create a buttery, almost nutty flavor.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeGreenTea.label: make green tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeMasalaChai.description: Make a musty, warm, almost woody tea crafted by simple leaves and complex spices. Alleged to be good against high cholesterol.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeMasalaChai.label: make masala chai
LanguageData.VBE_MakeMintTea.description: Make black tea leaves mixed with mint leaves and deeply steeped, then garnished with additional mint leaves. Leaves your breath surprisingly fresh.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeMintTea.label: make mint tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeNoonChai.description: Make an ancient Kashmiri tea mixing tea leaves, a pinch of salt and baking soda, which results in an striking pink beverage that is famous for being not only delicious but also healthy for the body. Very efficient for treating those with a high blood pressure.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeNoonChai.label: make noon chai
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEarlGreyTea.description: Make a very strong and semi-sweet fruity tea. Floral notes dance around one's pallet at even the most dull scent. People who finish the drink feel strangely urged to colonize.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeEarlGreyTea.label: make earl grey tea
LanguageData.VBE_MakeLemonTea.description: Make a dark tea cut with water, chilled and garnished with a wedge of bright lemon.
LanguageData.VBE_MakeLemonTea.label: make lemon tea
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedArm.description: Install a fleshcrafted arm. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedArm.label: install fleshcrafted arm
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedEar.description: Install a fleshcrafted ear. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedEar.label: install fleshcrafted ear
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedEye.description: Install a fleshcrafted eye. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedEye.label: install fleshcrafted eye
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedFinger.descriptio: Install a fleshcrafted finger. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedFinger.label: install fleshcrafted finger
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedFoot.description: Install a fleshcrafted foot. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedFoot.label: install fleshcrafted foot
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedHand.description: Install a fleshcrafted hand. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedHand.label: install fleshcrafted hand
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedHeart.description: Install a fleshcrafted heart. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedHeart.label: install fleshcrafted heart
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedJaw.description: Install a fleshcrafted jaw. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedJaw.label: install fleshcrafted jaw
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedKidney.descriptio: Install a fleshcrafted kidney. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedKidney.label: install fleshcrafted kidney
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedLeg.description: Install a fleshcrafted leg. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedLeg.label: install fleshcrafted leg
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedLiver.description: Install a fleshcrafted liver. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedLiver.label: install fleshcrafted liver
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedLung.description: Install a fleshcrafted lung. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedLung.label: install fleshcrafted lung
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedNose.description: Install a fleshcrafted nose. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedNose.label: install fleshcrafted nose
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedSpine.description: Install a fleshcrafted spine. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedSpine.label: install fleshcrafted spine
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedStomach.descripti: Install a fleshcrafted stomach. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedStomach.label: install fleshcrafted stomach
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedToe.description: Install a fleshcrafted toe. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedToe.label: install fleshcrafted toe
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedTongue.descriptio: Install a fleshcrafted tongue. This can be safely installed in colonists following a Fleshcrafting ideoligion, but will cause infections due to organ rejection in others.
LanguageData.VME_InstallFleshcraftedTongue.label: install fleshcrafted tongue
LanguageData.VME_Make_TackleBox.label: make tackle box
LanguageData.VCE_Make_Kibble_Moss.description: Make animal kibble by combining raw meat and moss. This recipe is slightly more efficient than using hay.
LanguageData.VCE_Make_Kibble_Moss.label: make kibble from moss
LanguageData.VCE_Make_ChemfuelFromCanola.description: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting biofuel from canola flowers.
LanguageData.VCE_Make_ChemfuelFromCanola.label: make chemfuel from canola
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromAlmonds.description: Extract vegetable milk from almonds. This milk can be used in any recipe that asks for milk.\n\nVegetable milks are generally inefficient, as a lot of nutrition is lost in the process.
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromAlmonds.label: extract milk from almonds
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromCoconuts.description: Extract vegetable milk from coconuts. This milk can be used in any recipe that asks for milk.\n\nVegetable milks are generally inefficient, as a lot of nutrition is lost in the process.
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromCoconuts.label: extract milk from coconuts
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromOats.description: Extract vegetable milk from oats. This milk can be used in any recipe that asks for milk.\n\nVegetable milks are generally inefficient, as a lot of nutrition is lost in the process.
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromOats.label: extract milk from oats
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromRice.description: Extract vegetable milk from rice. This milk can be used in any recipe that asks for milk.\n\nRice is very inefficient when converted into milk, and a lot of nutrition is lost in the process.
LanguageData.VCE_MilkFromRice.label: extract milk from rice
LanguageData.VCHE_Make_ChemfuelFromDeepchem.descripti: Make a batch of chemfuel by refining deepchem.
LanguageData.VCHE_Make_ChemfuelFromDeepchem.label: make chemfuel from deepchem
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeCattleCombBulk.description: Centrifuges a cattle comb to bulk extract milk, wool and muffalo genetic material.
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeCattleCombBulk.jobString: Extracting milk, wool and muffalo genetic material.
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeCattleCombBulk.label: bulk extract from cattle comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeCluckingCombBulk.descriptio: Centrifuges a clucking comb to bulk extract bee eggs, genewax and chicken genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeCluckingCombBulk.jobString: Extracting bee eggs, genewax and chicken genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeCluckingCombBulk.label: bulk extract from clucking comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeExplodingCombBulk.descripti: Centrifuges an exploding comb to bulk extract genetic honey, chemfuel, and boomalope genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeExplodingCombBulk.jobString: Extracting genetic honey, chemfuel, and boomalope genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeExplodingCombBulk.label: bulk extract from exploding comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHornedCombBulk.description: Centrifuges a horned comb to bulk extract genetic honey, genewax, and thrumbo genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHornedCombBulk.jobString: Extracting genetic honey, genewax, and thrumbo genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHornedCombBulk.label: bulk extract from horned comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHoundCombBulk.description: Centrifuges a hound comb to bulk extract genetic honey, genewax and canine genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHoundCombBulk.jobString: Extracting genetic honey, genewax and canine genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHoundCombBulk.label: bulk extract from hound comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHybernatingCombBulk.descrip: Centrifuges a hybernating comb to bulk extract genetic honey, genewax and bear genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHybernatingCombBulk.jobStri: Extracting genetic honey, genewax and bear genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeHybernatingCombBulk.label: bulk extract from hybernating comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMegaspideryCombBulk.descrip: Centrifuges a megaspidery comb to bulk extract insect jelly, genewax and insectoid genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMegaspideryCombBulk.jobStri: Extracting insect jelly, genewax and insectoid genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMegaspideryCombBulk.label: bulk extract from megaspidery comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMousyCombBulk.description: Centrifuges a mousy comb to bulk extract genetic honey, genewax and rodent genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMousyCombBulk.jobString: Extracting genetic honey, genewax and rodent genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMousyCombBulk.label: bulk extract from mousy comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeOrganicCombBulk.description: Centrifuges an organic comb to bulk extract honey, wax and template genomes
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeOrganicCombBulk.jobString: Extracting honey, wax and template genomes
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeOrganicCombBulk.label: bulk extract from organic comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugePurringCombBulk.description: Centrifuges a purring comb to bulk extract genetic honey, genewax and feline genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugePurringCombBulk.jobString: Extracting genetic honey, genewax and feline genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugePurringCombBulk.label: bulk extract from purring comb
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeScalyCombBulk.description: Centrifuges a scaly comb to bulk extract genetic honey, genewax and reptilian genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeScalyCombBulk.jobString: Extracting genetic honey, genewax and reptilian genetic material
LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeScalyCombBulk.label: bulk extract from scaly comb

LanguageData.GR_CraftControllerBulk.label: craft 5x controller
LanguageData.GR_CraftFertilityUnblocker.label: craft fertility unblocker
LanguageData.GR_CraftFertilityUnblockerBulk.label: craft 5x fertility unblocker

LanguageData.RB_CentrifugeMegaspideryComb.jobString: Extracting insect jelly, genewax and insectoid genetic material

LanguageData.GR_CraftGenomeExcavator.description: Craft a genome excavator to extract genomes from tamed or dead animals. This excavator can extract tier 1 and tier 2 genomes.
LanguageData.GR_CraftGenomeExcavator.label: craft genome excavator
LanguageData.GR_CraftAlphaGenomeExcavator.description: Craft a genome excavator to extract genomes from tamed or dead animals. This excavator can extract Alpha Animals genomes.
LanguageData.GR_CraftAlphaGenomeExcavator.label: craft alpha genome excavator
LanguageData.GR_CraftCosmicHorrorsExcavator.descripti: Craft a genome excavator to extract genomes from tamed or dead animals. This excavator can extract Cosmic Horrors genomes.
LanguageData.GR_CraftCosmicHorrorsExcavator.label: craft eldritch genome excavator
LanguageData.GR_CraftDinoGenomeExcavator.description: Craft a genome excavator to extract genomes from tamed or dead animals. This excavator can extract Dinosauria and Biomes! Prehistoric genomes.
LanguageData.GR_CraftDinoGenomeExcavator.label: craft dino genome excavator
LanguageData.GR_CraftMegafaunaGenomeExcavator.descrip: Craft a genome excavator to extract genomes from tamed or dead animals. This excavator can extract Megafauna genomes.
LanguageData.GR_CraftMegafaunaGenomeExcavator.label: craft megafauna genome excavator
LanguageData.GR_ExtractBeeGenes.description: Extract genetic material from several bees.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractBeeGenes.label: extract genes from several bees
LanguageData.GR_OrganicBeeCreation.description: Create basic genetically enhanced bees that can later be hybridized with other creatures.
LanguageData.GR_OrganicBeeCreation.label: create basic genetic bees
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeAwfulRecipe.description: Create an awful quality genoframe from an animal corpse.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeAwfulRecipe.label: create genoframe (awful)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeExcellentRecipe.description: Create an excellent quality genoframe from two good quality genoframes.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeExcellentRecipe.label: create genoframe (excellent)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeGoodRecipe.description: Create a good quality genoframe from two normal quality genoframes.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeGoodRecipe.label: create genoframe (good)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeLegendaryRecipe.description: Create a legendary quality genoframe from two masterwork quality genoframes.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeLegendaryRecipe.label: create genoframe (legendary)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeMasterworkRecipe.description: Create a masterwork quality genoframe from two excellent quality genoframes.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeMasterworkRecipe.label: create genoframe (masterwork)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeNormalRecipe.description: Create a normal quality genoframe from two poor quality genoframes.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeNormalRecipe.label: create genoframe (normal)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframePoorRecipe.description: Create a poor quality genoframe from two awful quality genoframes.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframePoorRecipe.label: create genoframe (poor)
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeAwfulRecipeFromWax.descripti: Create an awful quality genoframe from genewax.
LanguageData.GR_GenoframeAwfulRecipeFromWax.label: create genoframe (awful) from genewax
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesBear.description: Extract genetic material from an ursine corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesBear.label: extract genes from an ursine
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesBird.description: Extract genetic material from any avian corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesBird.label: extract genes from an avian
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesBoomalope.description: Extract genetic material from a boom animal corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesBoomalope.label: extract genes from a boom animal
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesCanine.description: Extract genetic material from a wolf, warg, dog or any other canine's corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesCanine.label: extract genes from a canine
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesFeline.description: Extract genetic material from a feline corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesFeline.label: extract genes from a feline
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesHuman.description: Extract genetic material from a humanoid.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesHuman.label: extract genes from a humanoid
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesMuffalo.description: Extract genetic material from a muffalo, bison or yak corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesMuffalo.label: extract genes from a muffalo
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesRodent.description: Extract genetic material from a rodent or leporid corpse.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractGenesRodent.label: extract genes from a rodent or leporid
LanguageData.GR_BearLeg.description: Craft a prosthetic animal leg strengthened with bear muscles, and ending in sharp bear claws that add a powerful melee attack.
LanguageData.GR_BearLeg.label: animal implant: bear leg
LanguageData.GR_BearLiver.description: Craft an implant that uses bear genes to improve function of the liver. Specially useful for those alcoholic chickens.
LanguageData.GR_BearLiver.label: animal implant: bear liver
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeHeart.description: Craft an implant that uses chemfuel to pump blood through the animal's body. This implant is intended for creatures whose heart is failing catastrophically, since it is less efficient than a natural heart.
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeHeart.label: animal implant: boomalope heart
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeStomach.description: Craft an implant that uses boomalope genes to improve function of the stomach.
LanguageData.GR_BoomalopeStomach.label: animal implant: boomalope stomach
LanguageData.GR_CanidEye.description: Craft an eye implant that uses genetic splicing with canid genes to give an old (or damaged) eye decent vision. This implant is not meant to replace healthy eyes.
LanguageData.GR_CanidEye.label: animal implant: canid eye
LanguageData.GR_CatTail.description: Craft a tail implant that uses genetic splicing with feline genes to substitute a broken or missing tail. This implant is not meant to replace a healthy tail. Note that only creatures with a natural tail can use this.
LanguageData.GR_CatTail.label: animal implant: cat tail
LanguageData.GR_ChickenBrains.description: Craft an implant that uses chicken brain tissue to patch damaged neurological pathways. This implant is intended for brain-dead creatures.
LanguageData.GR_ChickenBrains.label: animal implant: chicken brains
LanguageData.GR_ChickenKidney.description: Craft an implant that uses chicken genes to improve function of the kidney. Birds have large kidneys. Yep, you learned that today.
LanguageData.GR_ChickenKidney.label: animal implant: chicken kidney
LanguageData.GR_ChitinousHeart.description: Craft a bionic heart implant using a reinforced shell of insectoid chitin for protection. This is a heart designed to take a beating. Pun intended, but it's the last one, I promise.
LanguageData.GR_ChitinousHeart.label: animal implant: chitinous heart
LanguageData.GR_CrocodileSpine.description: Craft a bionic implant adding a sturdy crocodile spine to the creature's skeletal system.
LanguageData.GR_CrocodileSpine.label: animal implant: crocodile spine
LanguageData.GR_InsectileEye.description: Craft a bionic implant which gives the creature compound insectile eyes. Compared with simple eyes, compound eyes possess a very large view angle, and can detect fast movement.
LanguageData.GR_InsectileEye.label: animal implant: insectile eye
LanguageData.GR_InsectMandibles.description: Craft a bionic implant adding insect mandibles to the creature's face. Insect mandibles improve manipulation and eating, while also working as an offensive weapon
LanguageData.GR_InsectMandibles.label: animal implant: insect mandibles
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidPheromones.description: Craft an implant that uses genetic splicing with insectoid genes to give the ability to detect pheromones, thus improving the olfactory system. Can't be installed on birds and (ironically) insects.
LanguageData.GR_InsectoidPheromones.label: animal implant: insectoid pheromones
LanguageData.GR_LizardLeg.description: Craft a bionic animal leg reinforced with tough lizard skin.
LanguageData.GR_LizardLeg.label: animal implant: bionic lizard leg
LanguageData.GR_MechaHeart.description: Craft a bionic heart strengthened by the action of active mechanites.
LanguageData.GR_MechaHeart.label: animal implant: reinforced bionic heart
LanguageData.GR_MechaReceptors.description: Craft an elephant auditory receptor that can scan a really wide band of frequencies.
LanguageData.GR_MechaReceptors.label: animal implant: elephant auditory receptor
LanguageData.GR_MechaSpine.description: Craft a bionic implant adding a plasteel structure with active mechanites to the creature's skeletal system.
LanguageData.GR_MechaSpine.label: animal implant: reinforced bionic spine
LanguageData.GR_MechaTail.description: Craft an advanced animal tail, even more powerful than a natural one. Note that only creatures with a natural tail can use this.
LanguageData.GR_MechaTail.label: animal implant: reinforced tail
LanguageData.GR_MiniatureThrumboHorn.description: Craft a bionic implant adding a small thrumbo horn where the creature's nose used to be. This implant acts as a nose, allowing the creature to breathe and smell, and can be used by the creature in melee. Birds, insects, and creatures that already have a thrumbo horn don't have enough space on their skull to install this implant.
LanguageData.GR_MiniatureThrumboHorn.label: animal implant: miniature thrumbo horn
LanguageData.GR_MonitorLizardBrain.description: Craft a bionic implant using monitor lizard brain tissue. This highly intelligent reptile has very quick reflexes.
LanguageData.GR_MonitorLizardBrain.label: animal implant: monitor lizard brain
LanguageData.GR_MothTympanalOrgan.description: Craft a bionic implant adding a moth tympanal organ to the creature's ear. Moths can hear sounds of a higher frequency than any bat can produce.
LanguageData.GR_MothTympanalOrgan.label: animal implant: moth tympanal organ
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloLung.description: Craft an implant that uses muffalo genes to increase breathing capacity.
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloLung.label: animal implant: muffalo lung
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloSpine.description: Craft a spine implant that uses genetic splicing with muffalo genes to give an old (or damaged) spine decent functioning. This implant is not meant to replace healthy spines.
LanguageData.GR_MuffaloSpine.label: animal implant: muffalo spine
LanguageData.GR_RodentEar.description: Craft an ear implant that uses genetic splicing with rodent genes to give an old (or damaged) ear decent hearing. This implant is not meant to replace healthy ears.
LanguageData.GR_RodentEar.label: animal implant: rodent ear
LanguageData.GR_RodentNose.description: Craft an implant that uses genetic splicing with rodent genes to give an old (or damaged) nose decent smelling. This implant is not meant to replace healthy noses. Can't be installed on birds and insects.
LanguageData.GR_RodentNose.label: animal implant: rodent nose
LanguageData.GR_ScytherTail.description: Craft a scyther tail by attaching a scyther blade to an animal's tail. Uhmmm... where did you put all those old scyther blades? You asked around and no caravans seem to be trading them nowadays... Well, you will have to manufacture one using a cocktail of different genes. Note that only creatures with a natural tail can use this.
LanguageData.GR_ScytherTail.label: animal implant: scyther tail
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboBrain.description: Craft a bionic brain implant using thrumbo neural tissue. Superb intelligence and reflexes.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboBrain.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo brain
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboEye.description: Craft a bionic eye reinforced with specialized photoreceptors from a powerful thrumbo.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboEye.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo eye
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboJaws.description: Craft a bionic implant adding thrumbo jaws to the creature's mouth. These creatures devour trees, so you can imagine their jaws are up to the task.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboJaws.label: animal implant: bionic thrumbo jaws
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboLeg.description: Craft a bionic animal leg reinforced with muscle tissue from a powerful elephant.
LanguageData.GR_ThrumboLeg.label: animal implant: bionic elephant leg
LanguageData.GR_WolfJaws.description: Craft an implant that uses genetic splicing with wolf genes to give an old (or damaged) jaw decent functioning. This implant is not meant to replace healthy jaws.
LanguageData.GR_WolfJaws.label: animal implant: wolf fangs
LanguageData.GR_CraftBearClaws.description: Craft bear claws, a hybrid implant containing humanoid and bear DNA that adds a powerful melee attack.
LanguageData.GR_CraftBearClaws.label: human implant: bear claws
LanguageData.GR_CraftBearMuscleTissue.description: Craft bear muscle tissue, a hybrid implant containing humanoid and bear DNA that adds strength and stamina.
LanguageData.GR_CraftBearMuscleTissue.label: human implant: bear muscle tissue
LanguageData.GR_CraftBoomalopeNodules.description: Craft boomalope nodules, a hybrid implant containing humanoid and boomalope DNA that causes a huge explosion if the subject dies violently.
LanguageData.GR_CraftBoomalopeNodules.label: human implant: boomalope nodules
LanguageData.GR_CraftBunnyEars.description: Craft bunny ear. This huge leporid ear gives amazing enhanced hearing. Also, super kawaii!
LanguageData.GR_CraftBunnyEars.label: human implant: bunny ear
LanguageData.GR_CraftCatEye.description: Craft cat eye. This hybrid humanoid / feline eye provides improved night vision, at the expense of a certain short-sightedness outside and during the day. Ideal for nyctophile colonists.
LanguageData.GR_CraftCatEye.label: human implant: cat eye
LanguageData.GR_CraftChemfuelHeart.description: Craft chemfuel heart, a reinforced bionic heart that acts like a miniature 4-stroke internal combustion engine powered by chemfuel to pump blood through the body.
LanguageData.GR_CraftChemfuelHeart.label: human implant: chemfuel heart
LanguageData.GR_CraftChemfuelStomach.description: Craft chemfuel stomach, a reinforced bionic stomach that uses a combination of gastric acid and chemfuel to efficiently digest food.
LanguageData.GR_CraftChemfuelStomach.label: human implant: chemfuel stomach
LanguageData.GR_CraftCompoundEye.description: Craft compound eye. This hybrid humanoid / insectoid eye provides improved vision in a wide range of different wavelengths, including those usually outside the human range, completely modifying the way the subject perceives his surroundings.
LanguageData.GR_CraftCompoundEye.label: human implant: compound eye
LanguageData.GR_CraftDevouringJaws.description: Craft devouring jaws, a set of improved teeth designed to rapidly chew and ingest any kind of food. Leaves kind of a mess, though...
LanguageData.GR_CraftDevouringJaws.label: human implant: devouring jaws
LanguageData.GR_CraftDiggingBearClaws.description: Craft digging mole claws, grotesque but powerful hand blades that have been modified to be used in mining operations, increasing both speed and yield.
LanguageData.GR_CraftDiggingBearClaws.label: human implant: digging mole claws
LanguageData.GR_CraftHibernationModule.description: Craft hibernation module, a biochip that modifies the brain to reduce the need for sleep.
LanguageData.GR_CraftHibernationModule.label: human implant: hibernation module
LanguageData.GR_CraftHumanThrumboHorn.description: A genetically modified thrumbo horn that can be implanted in a subject's forehead. Nasty.
LanguageData.GR_CraftHumanThrumboHorn.label: human implant: thrumbo horn
LanguageData.GR_CraftIguanaScales.description: Craft iguana scales, a synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a measure of defense but, more importantly, makes the subject more resistant to high temperatures.
LanguageData.GR_CraftIguanaScales.label: human implant: iguana scales
LanguageData.GR_CraftInsectoidAntennae.description: Craft hybrid humanoid / insectoid feeling appendages that can be implanted in a subject's head, completely modifying the way the subject "sees" and feels the surrounding world. The experience may be slightly overwhelming due to sensorial overload.
LanguageData.GR_CraftInsectoidAntennae.label: human implant: insectoid antennae
LanguageData.GR_CraftKidneyToxicFilters.description: Craft kidney toxic filters, bioelectronic kidney prosthesis that greatly improve the efficiency of the subject's kidneys by using insectoid tissue, providing resistence to toxic substances.
LanguageData.GR_CraftKidneyToxicFilters.label: human implant: kidney toxic filters
LanguageData.GR_CraftMoleratNerveDampener.description: Craft mole-rat nerve dampener, a biochip that reduces pain sensitivity, allowing the subject to survive pain shock.
LanguageData.GR_CraftMoleratNerveDampener.label: human implant: mole-rat nerve dampener
LanguageData.GR_CraftMousePheromones.description: Craft mouse pheromones, a bionic vomeronasal organ that allows the subject pheromonal communication with other animals, increasing the chance of taming and training them successfully.
LanguageData.GR_CraftMousePheromones.label: human implant: mouse pheromones
LanguageData.GR_CraftMuffaloMammaries.description: By implanting muffalo mammaries into a colonist... Wait, what??? Who came up with this idea????? Anyway... this implant allows your colonist to be milked... What the...
LanguageData.GR_CraftMuffaloMammaries.label: human implant: muffalo mammaries
LanguageData.GR_CraftMuffaloMuscles.description: Craft muffalo muscles, a hybrid implant containing humanoid and muffalo DNA that strengthens the subject's muscular system.
LanguageData.GR_CraftMuffaloMuscles.label: human implant: muffalo muscles
LanguageData.GR_CraftMuffaloSkin.description: Craft muffalo skin, a synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a measure of defense but, more importantly, makes the subject more resistant to low temperatures.
LanguageData.GR_CraftMuffaloSkin.label: human implant: muffalo skin
LanguageData.GR_CraftNeuronReinforcement.description: Craft neuron reinforcement. A biochip using animal stem cells to reinforce the natural abilities of human neurons, increasing learning and research speed.
LanguageData.GR_CraftNeuronReinforcement.label: human implant: neuron reinforcement
LanguageData.GR_CraftOvipositor.description: Craft an ovipositor, a hybrid implant containing humanoid and chicken DNA that... are you sure this is a good idea? Really? Free range human eggs? Ugh...
LanguageData.GR_CraftOvipositor.label: human implant: ovipositor
LanguageData.GR_CraftPsychicDampeners.description: Craft psychic dampeners, artificial hearing aids that block psychic emanations, providing considerable resistance to mechanoids' psychic attacks.
LanguageData.GR_CraftPsychicDampeners.label: human implant: psychic dampeners
LanguageData.GR_CraftThrumboSkin.description: Craft thrumbo skin, a synthetic skin substitute that is much thicker and a much better insulator than human skin. This provides a lot of defense and makes the subject more resistant to extremes of temperature.
LanguageData.GR_CraftThrumboSkin.label: human implant: thrumbo skin
LanguageData.GR_CraftVenomousFangs.description: This hybrid implant substitutes the subject's jaw with a set of venomous fangs. Useful in combat, but not very comfortable.
LanguageData.GR_CraftVenomousFangs.label: human implant: venomous fangs
LanguageData.GR_CraftWolfMuscularFibers.description: Craft wolf muscular fibers, which can modify the subject's legs by weaving hybrid human/wolf muscle fibers within the base tissue, giving her a significant strength and speed boost.
LanguageData.GR_CraftWolfMuscularFibers.label: human implant: wolf muscular fibers
LanguageData.GR_ExtractMilkFromMilks.description: Extracts regular milk from hybrid milks, maintaining nutrition value but potentially losing special qualities.
LanguageData.GR_ExtractMilkFromMilks.label: extract milk from hybrid milks
LanguageData.GR_CreateTemplateGenome.description: Create a template genome that can be used to duplicate existing genome samples.\n\nThis recipe needs corpses totalling 100 Kg of mass.
LanguageData.GR_CreateTemplateGenome.label: create template genome

LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_BreakDownToxpack.des: Use manual labor to recycle volatile toxpacks into stabilized alloypacks and radioactive isotopacks.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_BreakDownToxpack.job: Recycling volatile toxpacks into isotopacks and alloypacks.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_BreakDownToxpack.lab: recycle volatile toxpacks into isotopacks and alloypacks
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_ChempackIntoChemfuel: Use manual labor to separate viable chemfuel from trash in reactive chempacks.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_IsotopackIntoUranium: Use manual labor to separate viable uranium from trash in radioactive isotopacks.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_WastepackIntoChempac: Use manual labor to recycle toxic wastepacks into reactive chempacks, creating reclaimed biopacks as a byproduct.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_Recycle_WastepackIntoToxpack: Use manual labor to recycle toxic wastepacks into volatile toxpacks, creating trash as a byproduct.
